creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
The pointyhat, tinderboxes and I can't reproduce your problem. I don't  
have any problem to install this port. The xmlto depends on docbook-xml by  
default. You will need to give us more details by follow this:  
http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html

Cheers,
Mezz


--
